welcome.title: Welcome to CityFlow! 🌍
welcome.description:
Build a global real estate empire across 18 cities worldwide.

Buy and develop properties, take loans from the bank, trade with other players, and climb the leaderboard.

The world evolves every month — prices shift, events unfold, and new opportunities appear.

Ready to become a property tycoon?

step1.title: 🗺️ World Map
step1.content:
Your window to the world.

Explore 18 cities across different countries.
See demand levels, average prices, and active events at a glance.

🟢 Green = High demand (good time to sell)
🟡 Yellow = Medium demand
🔴 Red = Low demand (good time to buy)

Click any city to dive into its property market.

step2.title: 🏪 Marketplace
step2.content:
The marketplace is where deals happen.

• Search and filter by city, country, price range, or property type
• Buy bank-owned properties at listed prices
• Browse player listings and make offers (min 70% of value)
• Sell your own properties to other players

Pro tip: Watch for low-demand cities — that's where bargains hide.

step3.title: 🏢 Property Details
step3.content:
Every property has a dedicated page with:

• Current market value & price history chart
• Monthly rent income & occupancy rate
• Building units with individual rent prices
• Market info: demand index, supply, growth rate
• Ownership history & transaction log

You can Buy, Sell, or Make an Offer on any property.

step4.title: 📊 Your Dashboard
step4.content:
Your command center.

Track everything in one place:
• Net worth, cash balance, and total property value
• Your full property portfolio with rent per property
• Rent collection pool — see uncollected rent and claim it
• Period bonus — free cash & XP every 6 hours
• Active loans & repayment progress
• Offers: received from other players & sent by you
• Full transaction history

Check back often to manage your empire.

step5.title: 🏦 Bank
step5.content:
Need capital to grow faster?

The bank offers loans with clear terms:
• Choose from different loan amounts & durations
• See monthly payments & total interest upfront
• Max loan = 70% of your net worth
• Repay early to save on interest

⚠️ Missed payments lead to penalties and repossession!

step6.title: 💰 Rent Collection
step6.content:
Your properties earn rent every month — but you need to collect it!

• Rent is deposited into your collection pool each month
• Click "Collect Rent" on your dashboard to claim it
• ⏰ You have 24 hours to collect before rent expires!
• Expired rent is permanently lost
• Warning notifications are sent when rent is about to expire

Don't forget to check your dashboard regularly!

step7.title: 🏗️ Development
step7.content:
Build your own properties from scratch.

1. Buy Land from the marketplace
2. Start Development — choose from 8 building types:
   🏠 Residential: Apartments, Housing Complexes
   🏢 Commercial: Offices, Shopping Centers
   🏨 Hospitality: Hotels, Resorts
3. Wait for construction to complete
4. Upgrade your buildings for higher rent:
   Renovation, Security, Luxury, or Expansion

Construction takes several months — plan ahead!

step8.title: ⭐ Leveling & XP
step8.content:
Earn experience points (XP) as you play and level up!

XP is earned by:
• Buying properties (+10 XP)
• Selling properties (+5 XP)
• Taking or repaying loans (+5/+3 XP)
• Starting construction (+15 XP)
• Upgrading buildings (+10 XP)
• Adding friends (+5 XP)
• Claiming your period bonus (+10–50 XP)

Higher levels unlock achievements and show your experience on your profile.

step9.title: 🌍 World Events
step9.content:
The world is alive and unpredictable.

Events affect city economies in real time:
• 📈 Boom — prices and demand surge
• 📉 Recession — demand drops, bargains appear
• 🌪️ Disaster — markets crash temporarily
• 📋 Policy Change — new regulations shift demand

Events can be local (one city) or global (all cities).
Adapt your strategy to profit from every situation.

step10.title: 📅 Seasons
step10.content:
The game runs in seasons — each lasting 720 months.

When a season ends:
• All data is archived with full rankings
• The world resets to a fresh state
• Everyone starts equal in the new season

Compete to be the season champion!
Your past rankings are shown on your profile.

Visit /seasons to see the full leaderboard.

step11.title: 👥 Friends & Social
step11.content:
CityFlow is better with friends.

• Add other players from their profile page
• Accept or decline friend requests
• View friends' net worth and portfolios
• Send offers and negotiate deals together

Build your network — allies can help you spot opportunities.

step12.title: 🚀 You're Ready!
step12.content:
You now know everything you need to start.

Quick strategy tips:
• Start by buying a few cheap properties
• Collect your rent regularly — it expires in 24h!
• Claim your period bonus every 6 hours for free cash & XP
• Use bank loans wisely to scale faster
• Watch city demand — buy low, sell high
• Develop land for long-term income
• Keep an eye on world events

Good luck, tycoon! 🏆

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: Welcome to CityFlow. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. CityFlow is a simulation game platform. All gameplay, economic systems, market values, property prices, loans, and returns are fictional simulation mechanics.

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: CityFlow is a simulation game. The platform does NOT provide financial advice, investment advice, real estate advice, legal advice, or tax advice. All gameplay, economic systems, market values, property prices, loans, and returns are fictional simulation mechanics and should not be interpreted as real-world guidance.

account.title: 2. Account Rules
items: You must be at least 13 years old to create an account
You may only create one account per person
You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials
You must provide accurate and complete information during registration
You are solely responsible for all activity that occurs under your account
You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account
Usernames must not impersonate others or contain offensive material

acceptableUse.title: 3. Acceptable Use
items: Use the platform only for its intended purpose as a simulation game
Treat other users with respect and courtesy
Report bugs and vulnerabilities responsibly
Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
Keep your account credentials confidential

prohibited.title: 4. Prohibited Behavior
items: Creating multiple accounts to gain unfair advantages
Using automated scripts, bots, or exploits
Harassing, threatening, or bullying other users
Sharing inappropriate, offensive, or illegal content
Attempting to access other users' accounts without authorization
Reverse engineering or exploiting the platform's code or systems
Selling, trading, or transferring accounts or virtual items for real money
Engaging in any activity that disrupts the platform's operations

virtualEconomy.title: 5. Virtual Economy Disclaimer
virtualEconomy.content: CityFlow features a virtual economy system for entertainment purposes only. Please be aware of the following:
items: All currencies in CityFlow are virtual and have no real-world value
All properties, assets, and items are virtual simulation elements
Property values, rental income, and investment returns are simulated and randomized
No real-world financial returns are guaranteed or implied
Virtual economy mechanics may change without notice
The platform is not responsible for any perceived loss of virtual value
Virtual items and currencies cannot be exchanged for real money through the platform

intellectualProperty.title: 6. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: All content, branding, logos, artwork, source code, game mechanics, and design elements of CityFlow are the intellectual property of CityFlow. You may not copy, modify, distribute, sell, or lease any part of our platform or its content without explicit written permission. Unauthorized reproduction or redistribution is strictly prohibited.

content.title: 7. User Content
content.content: You retain ownership of any content you create on the platform (such as your profile information). By using CityFlow, you grant us a limited license to use, display, and process your content as necessary to operate the platform. We reserve the right to remove any content that violates these Terms.

availability.title: 8. Platform Availability
availability.content: CityFlow is provided on an 'as-is' and 'as-available' basis. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation. The platform may experience downtime for maintenance, updates, or due to circumstances beyond our control. Features may be added, modified, or removed at any time without prior notice.

liability.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, CityFlow and its operators shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of data, loss of virtual items or progress, or any other losses arising from your use of the platform. The platform is provided without warranties of any kind, either express or implied.

moderation.title: 10. Moderation & Enforcement
moderation.content: We reserve the right to suspend, restrict, or terminate any user account at our sole discretion for violations of these Terms. This may include banning users, removing content, or restricting access to features. We may also take action against accounts that we reasonably believe pose a risk to the platform or its users.

termination.title: 11. Account Termination
termination.content: You may delete your account at any time by contacting us. Upon termination, your data will be handled in accordance with our Privacy Policy. We reserve the right to terminate accounts that are inactive for an extended period or that violate these Terms.

changes.title: 12. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may update these Terms from time to time. When we make material changes, we will notify users through the platform or by email. Your continued use of CityFlow after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the updated Terms.

disputes.title: 13. Dispute Resolution
disputes.content: Any disputes arising from these Terms or your use of CityFlow shall first be attempted to be resolved through informal negotiation. If a resolution cannot be reached, disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the courts applicable to the platform operator's location.

contact.title: 14. Contact Information
contact.content: For any questions or concerns regarding these Terms of Service, please contact us at legal@sizops.co.il.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: This Privacy Policy explains how CityFlow collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal information. By using our platform, you consent to the practices described in this policy.

dataCollected.title: 2. Information We Collect
items: Account information: username, email address, and encrypted password
Profile data: display name, avatar, bio, and language/theme preferences
Game activity: property ownership, transactions, construction projects, and gameplay progress
Technical data: browser type, device information, and IP address
Usage data: pages visited, features used, and interaction patterns
Legal acceptance records: timestamps of Terms of Service and Privacy Policy acceptance

howWeUse.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
items: To provide, maintain, and improve the CityFlow platform
To authenticate your identity and manage your account
To enable gameplay features including multiplayer interactions
To communicate with you about updates, offers, and support
To monitor and analyze usage patterns to improve the user experience
To detect and prevent fraud, abuse, and security incidents
To comply with legal obligations

storage.title: 4. Data Storage & Retention
storage.content: Your data is stored on secure servers and is retained for as long as your account is active. When you delete your account, your personal data is removed within a reasonable timeframe. Some anonymized or aggregated data may be retained for analytical purposes after account deletion.

protection.title: 5. Data Protection
protection.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information, including encryption of passwords at rest, secure HTTPS connections, and access controls on our systems. However, no method of transmission or storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies
cookies.content: CityFlow uses cookies and similar technologies for authentication, session management, and storing your preferences (such as theme and language). For detailed information about how we use cookies, please see our Cookie Policy.

sharing.title: 7. Data Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties for their marketing purposes. We may share anonymized, aggregated data that cannot be used to identify you. We may disclose information when required by law or to protect the safety and security of our platform and users.

yourRights.title: 8. Your Rights
items: Access your personal data and request a copy
Correct inaccurate or incomplete data
Request deletion of your personal data
Export your data in a portable format
Object to processing of your data
Withdraw consent for data processing at any time

children.title: 9. Children's Privacy
children.content: CityFlow is not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we become aware that a child under 13 has provided us with personal information, we will take steps to delete such information promptly.

changes.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we make material changes, we will notify users through the platform or by email. The 'Last updated' date at the top of this page indicates when the policy was last revised.

contact.title: 11. Contact Information
contact.content: For any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at legal@sizops.co.il.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: This Cookie Policy explains how CityFlow uses cookies and similar technologies when you access our platform. We are committed to being transparent about the technologies we use.

whatAre.title: 2. What Are Cookies
whatAre.content: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work efficiently and to provide information to website owners. Cookies can be 'persistent' (remaining on your device until deleted) or 'session-based' (deleted when you close your browser).

howWeUse.title: 3. How We Use Cookies
items: To keep you logged in and authenticate your sessions
To remember your theme and language preferences
To understand how you interact with the platform
To improve platform performance and user experience
To detect and prevent security threats and abuse

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.content: These cookies are necessary for the platform to function. They enable core features such as authentication, security, and session management. Without these cookies, the platform cannot operate properly.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.content: These cookies remember your preferences and settings, such as your chosen theme (light/dark), language (English/Hebrew), and other display options. They enhance your experience by providing personalized features.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.content: These cookies help us understand how users interact with the platform by collecting anonymized usage data. This information helps us improve features, fix issues, and optimize the user experience.

session.title: 5. Session Management
session.content: CityFlow uses session cookies to maintain your authenticated state while you use the platform. When you log in, a session cookie is created that allows you to navigate the platform without re-authenticating on every page. Session cookies are deleted when you log out or close your browser.

thirdParty.title: 6. Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.content: CityFlow does not use third-party advertising cookies. We may use third-party analytics tools that set their own cookies to help us understand platform usage. These third parties have their own privacy policies governing their use of information.

manage.title: 7. Managing Cookies
manage.content: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies. Please note that blocking essential cookies may prevent the platform from functioning correctly. You can typically find cookie settings in your browser's preferences or settings menu.

changes.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected on this page with an updated 'Last updated' date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

contact.title: 9. Contact Information
contact.content: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at legal@sizops.co.il.
